results.rendered_html:
āpīḍa (von pīḍ mit ā)
1〉 m.
a〉 das Zusammendrücken: galā˚  SUŚR. 2,201,21 .
— b〉 ein auf dem Scheitel getragener Kranz  AK. 2,6,3,38 . 3,4,238 .  H. 654 .  MBH. 3,12234 . baddhāpīḍa 1,7314 . vicitrakusumāpīḍāḥ  R. 2,48,11 . kurvanti kusumāpīḍān śirassu 93,12 . hayaiḥ kāñcanāpīḍaiḥ 6,18,2 . 19,9 . 86,9 . ayamagamaḥ (aśokaḥ) śrīmānasminvanāntare . āpīḍairbahubhirbhāti śrīmānparvatarāḍiva ..  N. 12,76 . tasminkulāpīḍanibhe  RAGH. 18,28 . Häufig am Ende von Personennamen, so z. B. in ajitāpīḍa, anaṅgā˚.
— 2〉 f. ˚ḍā N. eines Metrums  COLEBR. Misc. Ess. II, 165 .

results.rendered_html:
āpīḍa a.
1 Giving pain, hurting.
2 Squeezing, compressing.
3 A chaplet (tied on the crown of the head), garland in general; cūḍāpīḍakapālasaṃkulagalanmaṃdākinīvārayaḥ  Māl. 1. 2. 
4 (Hence fig.) A crest jewel; tasminkulāpīḍanibhe vipīḍaṃ  R. 18. 29 ;  Māl. 1 , 6 , 7.
